articles.title: Aaron Judge and Brice Turang power US to a 15-5 WBC-opening win over Brazil
articles.description:
The Americans walked 17 times and forced Brazil to throw 221 pitches.

The post Aaron Judge and Brice Turang power US to a 15-5 WBC-opening win over Brazil appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US baseball team wins 15-5 against Brazil in WBC opener on March 7.
Aaron Judge and Brice Turang lead with multiple hits, contributing to 17 walks.
Boston fans can expect increased excitement for upcoming games following strong performance.

articles.title: Cooper Flagg was asked if he wants to be a Celtic one day. Here’s what the Maine native said.
articles.description:
Flagg said he loves being with the Mavericks and doesn't want to be elsewhere. He's also looking forward to playing at TD Garden for a long time.

The post Cooper Flagg was asked if he wants to be a Celtic one day. Here’s what the Maine native said. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cooper Flagg expresses love for the Mavericks, prioritizing his current team.
Flagg, a Maine native, looks forward to playing at TD Garden.
His potential future with the Celtics could energize local fan support.

articles.title: With Jayson Tatum back in the fold, these Celtics know their story is just beginning
articles.description:
It's been a long journey without the star forward, but the story is far from finished.

The post With Jayson Tatum back in the fold, these Celtics know their story is just beginning appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum returns to the Celtics lineup, boosting team morale and performance.
Celtics aim for playoff success with Tatum, who missed crucial games this season.
Local fans anticipate increased ticket sales and excitement for upcoming home games.
